2330060.name: You Are Speed
2330060.description:
A short niche speed-running game with an advanced movement mechanics and hand made maps.

To celebrate my 25th birthday and to recover from burnout I made this game. In each level a part of a message I wrote is read aloud by me. 

Most levels contain more than one path to reach the objective (of blowing out a candle on a birthday cake for me :D).

You Are Speed contains:

* Multiple hand made levels

* A speed rating system and personal bests for every level

* An advanced movement system that includes:

  • Sprinting

  • Wall-running

  • Double jumping

  • Sliding / crouching

  • Grappling (as in with a grappling hook)

  • Speed boosts

  • Jump boosts

  • Launchers

  • Teleportation

  • Transforming into a flying spirit

  • And all the movement tech that can be achieved by combining those..

*具有完全音频支持的语言
